summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing of Locofast CMS new features. Fixed critical React error with composition rendering and improved legacy data normalization.

fixed_bugs.issue: React error: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {material, percentage})
fixed_bugs.fix: Updated composition rendering to format array as '78% Cotton, 21% Polyester' instead of rendering object directly
Improved legacy string parsing to extract percentage and material separately using regex

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with credentials admin@locofast.com / admin123
Backend: Auth/me endpoint with valid token
Backend: Seller CRUD with city, state fields
Backend: Fabric CRUD with pattern dropdown (9 options)
Backend: Fabric composition array (up to 3 materials with percentages)
Backend: Legacy composition normalization (string to array)
Frontend: Header logo links to www.locofast.com with target=_blank
Frontend: Admin login page loads and credentials work
Frontend: Seller form shows city, state, and category multi-select fields
Frontend: Seller card displays location and category tags
Frontend: Fabric form shows pattern dropdown, composition editor, starting_price, videos
Frontend: Fabric listing shows composition in correct format (100% Material)
Frontend: Fabric detail page shows all new fields (pattern, composition, starting_price)
Frontend: Homepage and Fabrics page render without errors after fix
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test seller for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Composition is now stored as array [{material: string, percentage: int}]. Legacy string compositions are automatically normalized on read via normalize_fabric() in server.py. Frontend renders composition as 'X% Material1, Y% Material2' format.
